description: A performance metric used to measure content or account success on media platforms, such as views, engagement, or conversion rates

name.description: Name of the metric, e.g. 播放量, 点赞数, 转化率, 粉丝数

platform.description: 该指标的数据来源平台

period.description: Time period this metric covers, e.g. 2024-Q1, 2024年, 过去30天
